title: Choose the right real-time transport
meta_description: Cut real-time transport latency 80% by choosing SSE for one-way or WebSockets for two-way traffic — RAM, cost, and browser limits for 2026
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams burn CPU and cash on the wrong real-time transport.

SSE costs 25% less RAM than WebSockets and works in 95% of cases.
